caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hooded sweatshirt with the words "BOSS TALK" across the chest is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring repeated logos that say "UNION HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him is a black mug with red and white text that includes "BOSS TALK OUT". A small logo is also visible in the bottom-left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression and head posture while looking off-camera to his right. The environment and equipment remain static as he continues his conversation.
